title: 把 skill 指令从 1625 行压到 183 行：progressive disclosure 重构
author: Zara Zhang
summary: frontend-slides skill 用 progressive disclosure 模式重构，功能不变但每次加载的 context 减少 89%（1625→183 行）。把指令文件当目录用，按需展开。
why_useful: 直接可用于优化我自己的 skill 库，降低 context 膨胀
my_take: 我那 ~100 个 skill 也该这么瘦身。

title: Building intelligent apps for Apple platforms with Claude in the Foundation Models framework
author: Claude Blog
summary: Today we're releasing Foundation Models framework support for Claude through a new Swift package that lets Apple developers use Apple's Foundation Models framework to call Claude for more complex workflows.
